name: Kabe-Koji-Nekoyashiki-kun Desires to be Recognized
original_name: 壁サー同人作家の猫屋敷くんは承認欲求をこじらせている
overview: A BL manga artist chasing fame reunites with his childhood crush, now a rising idol. Their worlds collide, rekindling feelings that never truly faded.

trailers.title: [ENG SUB] BL Drama "Kabe Koji" 30s PR Trailer
